pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json and verified in verifier.py (line 5)
Task specification in task.json and verified in export_result.sh (line 57 checks for 05:00)
Task specification in task.json and verified in export_result.sh (line 61 checks for 10:00)
Used in setup_task.sh (line 36) and export_result.sh (line 33) for database connection
SourceForge project page and install_floreant.sh (line 38) downloads from https://sourceforge.net/projects/floreantpos/files/floreantpos-1.4-build1707b.zip/download
task_utils.sh (line 8) defines FLOREANT_PIN="1111", referenced in task description as PIN required for Back Office access

setup_floreant.sh (line 89) mentions 'Derby database', scripts use JDBC Derby connection strings, verified via Floreant official documentation at https://floreant.org/support/installation-backoffice/database/
install_floreant.sh (lines 36-45) downloads from this URL with fallback mirror

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b, a real open-source restaurant management software downloadable from SourceForge. The agent must create a shift named 'Early Bird' with start time 05:00 (5:00 AM) and end time 10:00 (10:00 AM) in the Apache Derby database located at jdbc:derby:/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb. The application requires PIN 1111 to access the Back Office where shift configuration occurs. The database comes pre-populated with the Floreant installation and is not synthetic data. Database verification uses Apache Derby command-line tools to query the SHIFT table for the created shift record and its time values.
